title: acronia zarumae
intro: Acronia zarumae, also known as the Zaruma Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acronia zarumae include its ability to treat fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Acronia zarumae typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
